title: Doff Spider & Crawling Insect Killer – 300ml Aerosol, Ready-to-Use Insect Killer Targets & Controls Spiders & Crawling Pests - Ants, Cockroaches, Woodlice, Ticks & Fleas – Indoor Homes & Buildings
features: POWERFUL LASTING INSECT KILLER – Effectively eliminate spiders with Doff Spider & Crawling Insect Killer Aerosol. This ready-to-use spray kills crawling insects like ants, cockroaches, woodlice, ticks, and fleas. An effective spider killer for eliminating pests from indoor homes and buildings

EASY & VERSATILE APPLICATION – Spray this pest killer directly towards insects and hard surfaces from the instructed distance away. This insecticide targets ants and pests in domestic premises and institutional buildings like offices and factories, ensuring spaces remain insect-free and protected

FAST-ACTING & RELIABLE – Powered by tetramethrin and permethrin, these highly effective active ingredients provide a rapid pest control solution that can be reapplied as necessary. It targets spiders and pests without harming your family or pets when used as directed

COMPREHENSIVE INSECT DEFENCE – Formulated for quick action, this pest killer ensures efficient results across a wide range of spiders and crawling insects, keeping your environment pest-free and clean. The 300ml aerosol treatment can be reapplied when necessary, providing long-lasting protection

PEST CONTROL EXPERTS – With decades of expert experience, Doff products provide quality-crafted, dependable pest solutions. Proudly made in the UK, our household pest controls offers proven performance, helping to maintain a clean, safe and comfortable living space
